title: ichnocarpus archboldianus
intro: Ichnocarpus archboldianus, also known as the Borneo wild coffee or Wild coffee tree, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Borneo. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is rich in various bioactive compounds, such as alkaloids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-diabetic, and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Ichnocarpus archboldianus is often used in tea or tincture form, which is believed to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system.
